title: fhir export implemented
summary: Added optional FHIR Observation bundle export for mapped rows, wired it into the normalize CLI behind --emit-fhir, and verified the new output path without regressing the existing normalization baseline.
completed: Added optional FHIR bundle writing to the output directory
Added focused tests for FHIR bundle generation and CLI emission
Recorded a per-slice verification artifact for the change
decisions_locked: FHIR export is optional and explicit, not always-on
Only mapped rows are emitted as Observation resources
Per-slice verification records are now mandatory for implementation work
open_questions: Whether the next slice should focus on packaging or a stronger demo flow
Whether to introduce a proper FHIR validation step before release readiness
Whether mapped-but-partial rows need a second FHIR export policy later
next_steps: Stabilize packaging beyond editable local install
Add a stronger demo or sample-report flow on top of the CLI
Expand fixture coverage with more biomarkers and edge cases
resume_from: Start from project_memory/current_context.md, then choose between packaging stabilization and a stronger demo flow for the 90% milestone.
